assertions.description: IP Address Logging & Reporting is a Chrome Enterprise admin feature with no web-page-observable surface; no navigator.ipAddressLogging or similar global exists.
The Reporting API is the closest web platform surface; the ReportingObserver constructor remains available irrespective of enterprise logging.
navigator is exposed; enterprise logging hooks live below the JS layer and do not pollute it.
Local/remote IP addresses surface to web content only through WebRTC ICE candidates (gated by mDNS hostname obfuscation); the API is unchanged by enterprise logging.
fetch() does not gain new IP-address request headers as a result of this feature; the request object remains the standard HTML/Fetch shape.
